casting_reasoning: Python-only ML pipeline with PyTorch and numpy; full-project scope across 5 source files. Stage 1 casts peer-python-reviewer (all .py files), peer-quality-engineer (test coverage against the reproducibility and split-integrity success criteria), and peer-readability-engineer (full scope exceeds 200-line threshold). Stage 2 casts team-data-ml-reviewer as the primary lens — the stated aims (reproducibility, data leakage, metric logging) are squarely in its domain. team-performance-reviewer is cast because scope exceeds 5 files and the user has an explicit 30-minute wall-clock constraint. team-security-reviewer casts by default on config loading and file path handling. Stage 3 leadership casts unconditionally.
